We are committed to nurturing young minds by offering structured learning programs, expert mentorship, and a disciplined study environment that promotes both academic excellence and personal growth. At Top Neurons, we believe that education is not only about academic achievement but also about building character, confidence, and strong ethical values. Our mission is to create a supportive and inclusive learning environment that encourages curiosity, creativity, and a passion for lifelong learning. By empowering students with knowledge, skills, and values, we strive to help them overcome social and economic barriers and build a brighter future for themselves and their communities.

text: Prem Shanti Charitable Trust is a registered trust in Jaipur, Rajasthan, which primarily aims at welfare of the poor and underprivileged section of Indian society. Pratham Shiksha Charitable Trust, which shares a strong commitment to education and social welfare, collaborates with Prem Shanti Charitable Trust in supporting this transformative initiative. The trust has started a highly ambitious program “Top Neurons” for underprivileged but highly talented students. Many students with talent and intelligence couldn’t come forward due to poverty and they either cannot go to a college or they have to settle with ordinary colleges and finally gets very low paying jobs. This program selects such students from Class X who want to go to the top Engineering, Medical, Science colleges of India. This program helps these students economically and socially for two years when these students are in 11th and 12th class. The facilities like coaching from Top Coaching Institutes of India, P.G. Hostel, books and reading material, mentoring, etc. are provided in these two years. Our target is that most of these students can be selected into Top universities of India such as IISC, IISER, IIT, AIIMS, JIPMER, AFMC, etc.,
